## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `composer validate --strict` passes.
- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpunit` passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when public usage changed.
- [ ] No unrelated files or generated vendor files are included.

## Notes

Add migration notes, screenshots, or follow-up work if relevant.
